results.title: ClickSay - AI Feedback for Vibe Coders - Chrome Web Store
results.content:
Click any element, say your fix in 20 languages, paste into AI. Full context - selector, styles, screenshot, component. ClickSay is the fastest way to turn UI feedback into working code. Click any element on a web page, say what you want changed in any of 20 supported languages, and paste the structured prompt into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable, Bolt, or Replit. Three seconds from thought to code. If you have ever tried to describe a UI problem to an AI and gotten a vague, unhelpful response, ClickSay fixes that. Instead of writing "make the button bigger" and hoping the AI guesses which button you mean, ClickSay captures everything the AI needs to act precisely: the CSS selector, the element's HTML, its computed styles, a screenshot with the element highlighted, and even the [...] Chrome Web Store logoChrome Web Store

 My extensions & themes
 Appearance
 Developer Dashboard
 Give feedback

Sign in

Item logo image for ClickSay - AI Feedback for Vibe Coders

# ClickSay - AI Feedback for Vibe Coders

The publisher has a good record with no history of violations. Learn more.

LUMIERE MEDIA, INC

5.0(5 ratings)

Ratings are updated daily and may not reflect the most recent reviews.

ExtensionDeveloper Tools76 users

## Overview

Click any element, say your fix in 20 languages, paste AI-ready context into any coding tool. Three seconds from thought to code. [...] component hierarchy path. This means your AI assistant can find the exact source component to modify rather than searching through your codebase. DIRECT SEND TO CLAUDE CODE For developers using Claude Code in the terminal, ClickSay includes an optional local relay server. Run npx clicksay-relay and enable auto-send in the side panel. Your feedback prompts are sent directly to your Claude Code session - no clipboard paste needed. The relay runs entirely on localhost. FEEDBACK HISTORY Every piece of feedback you capture is saved to a persistent timeline, grouped by date. Revisit past feedback, recopy any prompt, or delete entries you no longer need. History is stored entirely in your browser using Chrome's local storage. SUGGESTION CHIPS After selecting an element, ClickSay shows

# ClickSay Reviews - What's Your Honest Take?

ClickSay

ClickSay

Hey everyone,

So we just hit the reviews section on Product Hunt and I'm genuinely curious what you think. If you've actually used ClickSay, we'd love to hear what's working for you and what's not. [...] The honest feedback helps us way more than generic praise - whether it's "this saved me hours" or "this feature is janky" or "I wish it did X instead." We're reading everything and planning our next updates based on what people actually need.

If you haven't left a review yet, it takes like 2 minutes and genuinely makes a difference for other makers finding the extension. Plus it helps us understand if we're solving the real problems people have.

Check it out here if you want to add your thoughts - 

What's been the most useful part of ClickSay for your workflow so far, or what would actually make you use it more?

results.title: ClickSay - Click. Say. Paste.
results.content:
How It Works

## Talk to your AI about what's on screen

Stop typing vague descriptions. Click the element, say what's wrong, and your AI gets the full picture.

1

### Click Any Element

Press `Cmd+Shift+K` and click anything on the page. ClickSay captures the selector, styles, HTML, screenshot, and component name.

2

### Speak Your Feedback

The mic starts automatically. Say "make this bigger" or "fix the padding." Just talk - like you'd explain it to a coworker.

3

### AI Gets It Right

A structured prompt with full context lands on your clipboard. Paste into Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Lovable, Replit, or Bolt.new. The AI knows exactly what you're talking about.

ClickSay tutorial video [...] # Dashboard Overview

 Context: 

...

(2 levels) Styles: font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a1a; font-family: system-ui; line-height: 1.2 Component: DashboardPage > PageHeader (React) File: src/components/Dashboard.tsx Screenshot: A11y: Heading hierarchy OK | Contrast 12.1:1 (passes AA) Feedback: Make this heading smaller, dark blue, and change the font to Inter

Privacy First

## Nothing leaves your browser

ClickSay runs 100% locally. Your feedback, your screenshots, your data - all on your machine.

### No Accounts

No sign-up, no login. Install and go.

### No Analytics

Zero tracking. Zero telemetry. We don't know you exist.

### Local Storage Only

Everything stored in Chrome on your device.

### Fully Transparent

100% client-side. No servers, no secrets. [...] v1.0.0 January 2026 +

 New Initial release - click any element, speak your feedback, copy to clipboard
 New Voice-first workflow with one-click copy to any AI tool
 New Configurable output presets - Simple, Standard, Detailed, Full
 New Accessibility audit - WCAG contrast, alt text, ARIA, and touch target checks

### ClickSay is a Chrome desktop extension

Get notified when mobile is available.

Thanks! We'll notify you when mobile is ready.

## Stop describing UI to your AI. Start showing it.

Just ClickSay it!

Add to Chrome - Free

### Contact Support

Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

ClickSay

results.title: Clickstay Reviews - Verified Guest Feedback from Feefo
results.content:
### Lynda Abedin

So glad I found this website.
Easy to use, I am in direct contact with the owner and no extortionate fees to pay .
Recommend it to anyone looking for a quality holiday let

### Norma Cameron from GBR

We stayed in 12 San Miguel Village. Very spacious accommodation with everything you could need for a holiday. Great location, close to restaurants a d tbe sea. Have booked again for next year.

### Rick from NLD

Quick and polite response from the host. Easy to book.

### Patricia Sayers from GBR

Very straightforward booking system and prompt replies to property queries by email. Holiday booked for February 26. So far so good.

### Stephen Lovell from Abertillery

Clickstay was very easy. First time I have used them, probably won't be be the last

### Robert Mcguire [...] ### Robert Mcguire

First class service, would definitely recommend and use again.

### John E from Leeds

Excellent quick service. Provided all the information needed.

Feefo logo

### Rated highly on Feefo

Over 3,000 verified reviews

### Lowest price pledge

Owners have the lowest prices on Clickstay

### Look on other sites

Read reviews and compare prices for the same holiday homes on Airbnb, Booking.com and Vrbo.

### Book direct and save money

Clickstay offers the lowest price for holiday rentals with no service fees or high commissions to the owner.

### Trusted and established

We have 21 years of experience and hundreds of thousands of holidaymakers have booked on Clickstay.

### Sign up to our newsletter

Stay up to date on our holiday news, deals and offers [...] Clickstay logo

Clickstay logo

# Clickstay reviews

## Read verified guest reviews from Feefo on Clickstay, a holiday home rental website with lower prices than other sites. Clickstay does not charge you service fees or owners high commissions meaning you are unlikely to find the same holiday letting cheaper on another site.

### John Merrywest from GBR

Easy to use, clear photos of properties. Owner response was quick friendly and helpful. Charges from host site kept to a minimum compared to other sites. Presentation spot on.

### MARK MAY from GBR

Quick communication , easy site to use

### Michael Moore

found it very easy to navigate great locations. Lots of options on. Properties. a step by step guide that takes you through the whole booking process,

### Lynda Abedin
